title: Mellow Reverie
description: An RPG-esque modpack thats fairly vanilla-like
body:
This is Mellow Reverie, a modpack that is RPG-esque that also doesn't stray too far from vanilla minecraft (I hope lmao)

Mellow Reverie seeks to expand through most of the minecraft's aspect and then some~

Become whichever class you please, from a steadfast archer to an arcanic wizard, Mellow Reverie allows you to be equipped and dressed to be any RPG class you desire~

Step back, relax in your seat as you cast your rod while your dishes cook at the side, at Mellow Reverie, you're able to explore the culinary world and enjoy a large amount of food and ways to cook 'em!

Challenge yourself with numerous bosses scattered across the world and across dimensions~ explore numerous ruins with friends by air, by water or even by land~ or just be silly and blow some bubbles with soap and a bubble ring.

Welcome to Mellow Reverie, where lofty comforts meet ambitious adventures.
